channel.title: Openai on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Openai on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Make SearchGPT Default Search Engine on Microsoft Edge
item.description: Just the Steps Open settings Search for “address bar” (Privacy, search, and services -> Address bar and search) Select “Manage search engines” Select “Add” Fill in the fields with the following information: Search engine: SearchGPT Shortcut: @ai URL with %s in place of query: https://chatgpt.com/?q=%s&hints=search Click “Save” Click the three dots next to SearchGPT and select “Make default” If you don’t want to set SearchGPT as your default search engine, you can still use it by typing “@ai” in the address bar followed by your search query.

item.title: Generating Images With Dalle
item.description: I’ve recently been working on an app with my wife called “Abi’s Recipes”. The app, designed for mobile and TV, aims to be the Netflix of recipes, with a focus on beautiful images and a simple interface. We wanted to generate images for the recipes that we don’t have photos for, and we wanted to do it in a way that was fun and creative. That’s where DALL-E comes in.

item.title: Crashify AI
item.description: Crashify AI is a website that lets you generate 10-part “../../posts/projects/crashify"crash courses. https://crashify.ai

item.title: AI Co-Founded
item.description: AI Co-Founded is a website that helps you generate business plans. https://aicofounded.com
